saveGame() - Method in class controller.GamePanelController
Saves the game state to a file.

Sets the name of the avatar image for the player.

Sets the amount of the player's current bet.

Sets the list of cards the player has.
setDealer(Player) - Method in class model.ModelManager
Sets the dealer.
setDeck(BJCards) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the deck of cards associated with the player.
setHand(int) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the value of the player's current hand.
setHp(Player) - Method in class model.ModelManager
Sets the human player.
setLevel(int) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the level of the player.
setLost(int) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the number of games lost by the player.
setMoney(int) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the amount of money the player has.
setOpponents(List<Player>) - Method in class model.ModelManager
Sets the list of opponent players.
setPlayed(int) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the number of games played by the player.
setPlayerName(String) - Method in class model.Player
Sets the player's name.
